text.tspan: quantum state being preserved across transformations
each world a value, row, column, matrix
the octave round tripper will generate a gnu ocative representation of the code as numbers that can reverse itself back to
the original code. we can apply octave to the data and produce new code.
we will show how we can encode a program into single number, a column, a row, a matrix, and eigenamtrix. all equivalent but
different shape and folding. this is our lattice of forms. we have 2^n forms for the ai to look at as projections or views
we can apply ml tools in octave.
